Package io.forja.components.inputs.fxPasswordField

Class FxPasswordField

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.inputs.fxPasswordField.FxPasswordField
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxPasswordField extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A styled password input with optional leading icon, helper/error text, and an optional reveal-toggle that swaps to a plain text view.

FxPasswordField is a composite VBox of two rows:

  1. A framed HBox carrying the leading icon (if any), a StackPane holding the masked PasswordField and the plain TextField (swapped via revealable + revealed), and the trailing reveal-icon button (if revealable).
  2. A FxLabel carrying the helper or error text — auto-hidden when both are empty.

The two inner inputs share the same text via a bidirectional binding. When setRevealed(true) on a revealable field, the plain TextField is shown; otherwise the masked PasswordField is shown. When setRevealable(false) the reveal icon is hidden and the field is forced back to masked.

The preferred way to construct an FxPasswordField is via the builder:

     
      FxPasswordField password = FxPasswordField.builder()
          .promptText("••••••••")
          .leadingIcon("fth-lock")
          .revealable(true)
          .helperText("8+ characters with a number and symbol.")
          .build();
See Also:
  • InputVariant
  • FxPasswordField.Builder

    • getHelperText

      public String getHelperText()
      Returns the current helper text.

    • setHelperText

      public void setHelperText(String v)
      Sets the helper text. Empty/null hides the helper line.

    • errorTextProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.StringProperty errorTextProperty()
      Returns the error-text property.
      See Also:
      • getErrorText()
      • setErrorText(String)

    • getErrorText

      public String getErrorText()
      Returns the current error text.

    • setErrorText

      public void setErrorText(String v)
      Sets the error text. Non-empty value auto-flips variant to InputVariant.ERROR; clearing does not auto-revert.

    • revealableProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty revealableProperty()
      Returns the revealable property — whether the eye toggle is shown.
      See Also:
      • isRevealable()
      • setRevealable(boolean)

    • isRevealable

      public boolean isRevealable()
      Returns whether the eye toggle is shown.

    • setRevealable

      public void setRevealable(boolean v)
      Sets whether the eye toggle is shown. Disabling forces masked state.

    • revealedProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty revealedProperty()
      Returns the revealed property — whether the plain text is shown.
      See Also:
      • isRevealed()
      • setRevealed(boolean)

    • isRevealed

      public boolean isRevealed()
      Returns whether the field is currently showing plain text.

    • setRevealed

      public void setRevealed(boolean v)
      Sets whether the field shows plain text. Only honored when revealable.

    • isShowingError

      public boolean isShowingError()
      Returns whether the helper label is showing the error text.

    • builder

      public static FxPasswordField.Builder builder()
      Returns a new FxPasswordField.Builder for constructing an FxPasswordField.
      Returns:
      a new FxPasswordField.Builder instance
